Class SingleTaskChain

java.lang.Object
adris.altoclef.tasksystem.TaskChain
adris.altoclef.chains.SingleTaskChain
Direct Known Subclasses:
FoodChain, MLGBucketFallChain, MobDefenseChain, UserTaskChain, WorldSurvivalChain
public abstract class SingleTaskChain extends TaskChain
